description: I'm a motivated and detail-oriented Full Stack Developer with a strong foundation in web development technologies and databases. I completed a comprehensive 6-month Full Stack Python training from Naresh IT, Hyderabad.

My expertise spans Python, JavaScript, React JS, and modern web technologies. I'm skilled in building responsive front-end interfaces, RESTful APIs, and managing databases including MySQL and MongoDB.

Currently working as a Front End Developer at Ener Panel Pvt. Ltd., I'm passionate about converting UI/UX designs into functional, responsive web applications. I'm eager to contribute to innovative projects and grow in a dynamic environment.

features.title: Self-Motivated
features.description: Driven to deliver high-quality solutions and continuously improve my skills.

features.title: Team Management
features.description: Experienced in collaborating with teams and managing development workflows.

features.title: Quick Learner
features.description: Rapidly adapts to new technologies and frameworks to stay current.

features.title: Strong Communication
features.description: Effective communicator with ability to articulate technical concepts clearly.

projects.title: Simple Banking System
projects.description: Developed a secure banking system using Django with user authentication, account management, transaction processing, and real-time balance tracking features.

projects.title: File Management System
projects.description: Built a desktop-based Python application to perform comprehensive file operations including create, read, update, delete, search, and organize files efficiently.

projects.title: E-Commerce Clone (Flipkart/Amazon)
projects.description: Designed and developed responsive static e-commerce website clones using modern UI components, product listings, and shopping cart interfaces.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Personal portfolio site built with HTML, CSS & JavaScript. Features smooth animations, responsive layout, and modern UI design to showcase skills and projects.

education.description: Graduated with CGPA 7.9. Specialized in Computer Science fundamentals, programming, web development, and database management systems.
Completed Higher Secondary education with 60% in Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry stream, building strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Completed secondary education with GPA 7.2 under Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) curriculum.

experience.description: Designing and developing responsive web pages using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap. Converting UI/UX designs into functional web pages with clean code. Implementing responsive layouts for cross-device compatibility.
responsibilities: Developed user interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Bootstrap
Converted UI/UX designs into functional web pages with clean and structured code
Implemented responsive layouts ensuring compatibility across desktops, tablets, and mobile devices
Collaborated with design and backend teams to deliver seamless user experiences

experience.description: Developed and maintained responsive front-end interfaces, built and integrated RESTful APIs, and managed MySQL and MongoDB databases. Gained hands-on experience throughout the full software development lifecycle.
responsibilities: Developed and maintained responsive front-end interfaces
Built and integrated RESTful APIs for seamless data communication
Managed databases including MySQL and MongoDB
Enhanced team productivity by troubleshooting bugs and optimizing application performance
Gained hands-on experience from design to deployment

training.title: 6-Month Full Stack Python Course
training.description: Completed comprehensive training covering Python programming, web development with Django, database management (MySQL/MongoDB), RESTful API development, and full-stack project development.
